Control documents, training, and change with traceability. Track CAPAs, audits, and NCs with audit-ready records. Qualify suppliers and manage parts with visibility. ![product-nav_product-development-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_product-development-icon.svg) Connect design, risk, and AI-powered traceability as you build. Link needs, requirements, and verification to design controls. Automate traceability from dev tools for faster releases. Assess ISO 14971 risk as requirements and tests evolve. ![product-nav_clinical-evidence-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/product-nav_clinical-evidence-icon.svg) Oversee studies with connected data, documents, and workflows. Capture compliant clinical data with a validated medical EDC. Plan and manage PMCF aligned to EU MDR expectations. Collect clinical outcome data in-person or remotely on any device. ![lightbulb-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/lightbulb-icon.svg) Built with regulatory insight to help medtech teams move faster with confidence. ![ai-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/ai-icon.svg) Find issues faster and make smarter decisions with less manual work. ![education-icon](https://www.greenlight.guru/hubfs/education-icon.svg) Tools and resources that help teams implement quickly and meet requirements. ![Asset 22@3x 1]() #### QMSR is coming.
